title: Water , a lifeform
author: Priya
content:
Water is the 1 and only resource which sustain our life  and we can't survive without it not for more than a day or 2 . It is the most precious form of resource which may available for free but values like a priceless dime. And 1 understand its value only in its absence. It's a free form of equitable resource and shares among everyone irrespective of your economic wealth .Whether u r rich or poor , no one can deprive u its access . 1 can live without food , shelter and every necessity of their life but can't devoid themselves of water.Water is life and without it our existence is next to nothing. Every molecular objects we see in our surroundings has presence of water in some of its form.Every man-made objects we use has constituents of water in different state. Every inanimate object or a living body consume water in its synthesis and development.

Earth is composed of five elements: air, water, soil , fire, and space . These five elements are considered the fundamental building blocks of nature and the universe.Any of missing elements could disproportionate natural composition of substance present in our ecosystem. But without water presence of a sustainable atmosphere is unfathomable. There wouldn't have been any life on earth , no greenery , no vegetation , in a dried, barren land in a hot air balloon type of atmosphere . with water we have a planet that is more liveable , breathable ,eco -friendlier.

Water and it's resourcefulness with money

~ Water has its many forms as sea, river, ponds , underground water or in the form of glaciers as ice capes. And constitute 71% of our earth crust with water but only a small percentage of it is safe to drink , potable. But inspite of knowing this we use it less but waste a lot. And wasting of water is flowing of money . Money once lost can be earned but losing water is losing life . No water bodies ,no species not even us can sustain our life in absence of it Water is fuel to our body to make it run and function. Without it our body too would corrode like a machine under insufficient supply required in making of our body. How much money we invest in our making, our body gives the same return and water may be priceless but much more dearer than the invested money for a fuller body functioning.

Over Utilisation of water


~ We know water is our basic need but still we don't use it optimally instead waste it considering it's a free resource , readily available.And we have never realised how tough our life would be when this free form of resource become scarce.Today , it is free so we waste it and when it's abundance won't be here we would know it's real worth.We understand importance of things when it is not around .Think of a situation when there are no microbial species in our planet , will plants survive without it ? just with air , sunlight .Can there be a sustainable ecological presence with no microbes in nature who decompose waste into a more biodegradable substance for plants as compost for their manuring , in our body as probiotics , in form of tiny bacteria that our body needs .They balances and maintain our biodiversity , as a corollary water draws the same proposition because without them life is of no little importance at scale.

Our body needs 70% water to keep it healthy.Cooking,dishes, laundry, cleaning, our bath all consumes gallons of water daily. And when we multiply it with the number of households it results in many millions of metric tonnes of our daily consumption. We waste water like shredded piece of paper and didn't realise for a minute how our life would be with little or no water. A theory says that "energy can neither be created nor destroy and can only be transferred from 1 form to another". Water too has a form of energy of convection current flows through it which changes its state from liquid to gas. And form a reversible cycle through rainfall which is available to us as underground water. And by wasting such water in any form we r causing our water level to decline and putting lives of our coming generations at risk of worsening.


Why to preserve water from its excessive use and wastage and to conserve it like a custodian of nature from external suspended particles and contaminants has many delving features to look into -

? Water keeps our environment cooler from the warmth of sun and retain good climatic condition under moderate temperature.

? It keeps every living bodies alive by acting as a cure to several skin diseases and by making us fit and healthy from within.

? Every production activity in factories requires water to manufacture goods. Whether that be raw goods and materials of house making, toys or plastic ware , cooking utensils , or our cars and vehicles .

? The clothes we wear ,house we live on , our food , cars or even mobile batteries. All such commodities gives us finishing goods which intakes lots of water for a good , replenished , refined end products.

? Lots of water blows up in irrigation and crops enrichment. washing off fruits and veggies, cooking used large quantity of water.We can't stop feeding ourselves and so can't minimize excess use of it .

? Artificial rainfall is done for pollution control . Cloud seeding is done with dry ice , sodium iodine in warm cloud for it to gain moisture and gather water droplets to precipitate as rainfall or snowfall.

? Water carries many medicinal qualities and used as a remedy for cardiovascular disease, to dilate blood in winters , for pain reliving with hot sauna bath or steam rooms. Water used in nebulizer in steam form to act on choking throats , cough , cold .

Looking to all these it becomes very much evident how water accentuate its importance in our life . And we must be notable enough to know how to suffice our need by using water minimally if certain water crisis of drought or scarcity can arise in future.



Water is most precious, quintessential form of life and needs us to be little more carious to save it from the doomsday calling. Flowing it needlessly can cause us trouble for long term and could make us to suffer from its scarcity.We say "many a little makes a mickle" .Which implies that every drop of it is valuable and must not be wasted. Because our few drops of water could bring to someone an ocean of love and happiness.Things which are of little value to us can be of great importance to others who makes daily struggle for those few ounces of water which we waste casually on the go by keeping our taps open for longer hours even when not in use.By saving afew drops of water daily we can save many lives , for whom getting access to clean , drinking water  is a nut cracker.So , Save water save life.
